interactions.summary: Jiang answers the closing question by identifying his real channels and distinguishing them from impersonator accounts.
The host thanks Jiang, promises links below, and closes the video.

claims.claim: Jiang says his authentic public outlets are the Predictive History YouTube channel and the PredictiveHistory.Substack.com newsletter.
Jiang says there are multiple channels pretending to be him, so viewers should verify that they are following the correct Predictive History account.

signature_moments.moment: Even the closing plug carries a warning that counterfeit Jiang channels are already circulating.
signature_moments.source_phrase: there are lots of YouTube channels that purport to be me
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It is a minor but source-specific detail that may matter for public routing and attribution.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang names this as both his main YouTube identity and the place to follow his lectures and geopolitical analysis.

chronology_notes.note: The closing self-identification confirms where Jiang wanted audiences sent as of 2026-01-24.
